name: Bioscience Neutraceuticals, Inc.
summary: Bioscience Neutraceuticals, Inc. provides organic essential oil products. The company is involved in repackaging and rebranding pure oils for sale to the end customers. Its product line consists of tea tree, eucalyptus, castor, rosehip, lemon, cinnamon, cedarwood, lemongrass, and emu oils. The company was formerly known as JobLocationMap Inc. and changed its name to Bioscience Neutraceuticals, Inc. in December 2018. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Chicago, Illinois. Bioscience Neutraceuticals, Inc. is a subsidiary of Peak Global Holdings Limited.
